scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n author,agent,viewer,sshot -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/author-site dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/agent-service dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/viewer-site dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/screenshot-service dev"
scripts.dev:author: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/author-site dev
scripts.dev:preview: concurrently -n author,sshot -c blue,yellow "corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/author-site dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/screenshot-service dev"
scripts.check:author: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/author-site typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/author-site test
scripts.check:agent: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/agent-service typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/agent-service test
scripts.check:screenshot: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/screenshot-service typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/screenshot-service test
scripts.check:project-core: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/project-core typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/project-core test
scripts.check:project-scaffold: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/project-scaffold typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/project-scaffold test
scripts.check:project-cli: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/preview-contract typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/preview-contract test && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/project-cli typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/project-cli test
scripts.check:knowledge-core: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/knowledge-core typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/knowledge-core test
scripts.check:knowledge-service: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/knowledge-service typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/knowledge-service test
scripts.check:sketch-core: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/sketch-core typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/sketch-core test
scripts.check:sketch-react: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/sketch-react typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/sketch-react test
scripts.check:all: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/preview-contract typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/preview-contract test && corepack pnpm check:sketch-core && corepack pnpm check:sketch-react && corepack pnpm check:sketch-playground && corepack pnpm check:knowledge-core && corepack pnpm check:knowledge-service && corepack pnpm check:project-core && corepack pnpm check:project-scaffold && corepack pnpm check:project-cli && corepack pnpm check:agent && corepack pnpm check:screenshot && corepack pnpm check:author && corepack pnpm check:viewer
scripts.diagnostics:recent: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics recent
scripts.diagnostics:session: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics session
scripts.diagnostics:trace: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics trace
scripts.diagnostics:operation: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics operation
scripts.diagnostics:project: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics project
scripts.diagnostics:autosave: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics autosave
scripts.diagnostics:collab: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics collab
scripts.diagnostics:preview: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics preview
scripts.diagnostics:export: corepack pnpm --filter @workbench/cli-tools exec tsx src/index.ts diagnostics export
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test --config test/创作端E2E回归测试/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:core-flow: playwright test --config test/创作端E2E回归测试/playwright.config.ts author-core-flow-regression.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: playwright test --config test/创作端E2E回归测试/playwright.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: playwright test --config test/创作端E2E回归测试/playwright.config.ts --headed
